hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'brainstorm/0[0-6]'; then npx tsx "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/update-bs-status.ts" --brainstorm-dir "$(pwd)/brainstorm" 2>/dev/null; fi
